meta.title: Mobius Lens Calculus — Enriched with Formal Theorems
meta.seed_law: L_4 Latin square with Z_4 carrier
meta.governing_equation: M_4 = (X x Y, K, A, omega, tau) with four exact projections Pi_sq, Pi_fl, Pi_cl, Pi_fr
meta.key_insight: Square, Flower, Cloud, and Fractal are not four different things. They are four exact projection bodies of one kernel object.

kernel_4x4.name: Canonical 4x4 Mobius Kernel M_4
kernel_4x4.definition: K(x,y) := ell_4(x,y) — minimal lawful seed, all larger boards are recursive unfoldings
kernel_4x4.object_tuple: (X x Y, K, A_atlas, omega_witness, tau_burden)

mobius_atlas_gluing.description: Mobius character formalized as nontrivial orientation-reversing chart gluing, not as metaphor

construction.two_copies: U_+ = X x Y x {+}, U_- = X x Y x {-}

effect_on_lenses.flower: preserves z and flips the sign of w: (z,w) -> (z,-w)
effect_on_lenses.cloud: sends fiber over (z,w) to fiber over (z,-w)
effect_on_lenses.fractal: requires recursive law to be equivariant under digitwise application of sigma

square.name: Square Lens
square.subtitle: Contract / Address / Admissibility Body
square.description: Discrete admissibility ledger: fixes WHERE the object is, WHAT state it carries, and WHAT law generated it

at_6d.object: Sq_6(Omega_6) = committed visible board + exact defect label
at_6d.carrier: Visible board skeleton from admissible mirror-board family
at_6d.payload: Embedded 4D kernel Theta_4 at each committed position
at_6d.meaning: Square is the cockpit of commitment — explicit board, exact permutations, exact diagonal closure

square.higher_octave: 4^k refinement law: canonical (4^k) nested address grid at depth k

flower.name: Flower Lens
flower.subtitle: Relation / Corridor / Dynamical Body
flower.full_object_4d: Pi_fl(x,y) = ((x,y), z, w, O_z, T_w, omega^fl_{x,y})
flower.description: Corridor / orbit / dynamic continuity structure — where the kernel becomes flow

at_6d.law: Flower move <=> (Square board move) * (pi-rotation) * (chi-flip if present)
at_6d.dynamics: m_3(i,b,o) = (i+1 mod 3, b+2 mod 4, -o) — triadic Mobius crossing

flower.higher_octave: Orbit O^(k) and tunnel T^(k) sheets over Z_4^k carrier

cloud.name: Cloud Lens
cloud.subtitle: Lawful Multiplicity / Fiber Object
cloud.admissibility: z equiv w (mod 2) — solution exists iff sum and difference have same parity
cloud.admissible_base: A_ZW = {(z,w) in Z_4^2: z equiv w mod 2}

fiber_theorem.name: Cloud Fiber Theorem (Theorem 1)
fiber_theorem.statement: The relation map Phi: X x Y -> Z_4^2 has image exactly A_ZW, and every admissible point has a 2-point fiber
fiber_theorem.proof: (z,w) realizable iff 2x equiv z+w mod 4 and 2y equiv z-w mod 4, solvable iff z equiv w mod 2; each equation has 2 solutions mod 4 differing by 2
fiber_theorem.status: Rigorous seed of the whole Cloud renderer

cloud.description: Cloud is NOT uncertainty — it is structured, lawful multiplicity. Every admissible relation point has exactly 2 pre-images.

at_6d.object: Cl_6(Omega_6) = mu(pi, chi, epsilon, t, xi) — probability measure over embedded 4D payload
uncertainty_over: which admissible board skeleton is active
at_6d.pushforward: mu' = F_# mu — every exact move acts on Cloud by pushforward

cloud.higher_octave: Cloud^(k) fiber measure over Z_4^k carrier: |F^(k)_{z,w}| = 2^k

fractal.name: Fractal Lens
fractal.subtitle: Seed / Replay / Compression Body

operations.expand: Expand(sigma) = Sq(Omega) — replay seed to full visible state
operations.collapse: Collapse(Sq(Omega)) = sigma — compress visible state to minimal seed

fractal.closure_law: Expand compose Collapse ~ id (up to symmetry quotient)

fractal_exactness_theorem.name: Fractal Exactness Theorem (Theorem 2)
fractal_exactness_theorem.statement: Every value of L_{4^m} is the quaternary concatenation of seed interactions along the address ladder
fractal_exactness_theorem.proof: The digit in position t is exactly ell_4(r_t, c_t). Immediate from the base-4 lift law.
fractal_exactness_theorem.status: Rigorous seed of the Fractal renderer

fractal.description: Minimal seed, replay law, collapse/expand discipline, canonicalization — compression layer that makes the system transportable

at_6d.object: sigma_6(Theta_4; pi, chi; epsilon; t; s) — seed = row-triple or column-triple + shell/board tags

fractal.higher_octave: Fractal^(k) seed sigma^(k) over nested 4^k body with depth-k replay

mobius_flower_compatibility_theorem.name: Theorem 3 — Mobius-Flower Compatibility
mobius_flower_compatibility_theorem.statement: Under the involution sigma(x,y) = (y,x), the Flower coordinates transform by (z,w) -> (z,-w)
mobius_flower_compatibility_theorem.proof: z' = y+x = x+y = z, w' = y-x = -(x-y) = -w
mobius_flower_compatibility_theorem.significance: Cleanest exact Mobius law in the 4x4 kernel

four_lens_objecthood_theorem.name: Theorem 4 — Four-Lens Objecthood
four_lens_objecthood_theorem.statement: A Mobius 4x4 kernel event is a mature object iff: (1) its Square projection is admissible, (2) its Flower projection has a lawful corridor/invariant structure, (3) its Cloud projection has an admissible fiber shell, (4) its Fractal projection is executable/replayable, (5) the six pairwise bridges and higher closure relations are coherent.
four_lens_objecthood_theorem.proof_sketch: If any one projection is absent, the object lacks one constitutive body. If projections exist but do not cohere under bridge laws, they describe a fragmented family of partial objects, not one mature object.

equivariant_lens_laws.description: Each lens must descend to the Mobius quotient M_4
equivariant_lens_laws.square_equivariance: Pi_sq(J(x,y,epsilon)) = Pi_sq(y,x,-epsilon) related to Pi_sq(x,y,epsilon) by the declared square bridge law
equivariant_lens_laws.flower_equivariance: J_fl(z,w,epsilon) = (z,-w,-epsilon) — Flower chart transforms by preserving z and flipping w and orientation
equivariant_lens_laws.cloud_equivariance: J_cl: F_{z,w} -> F_{z,-w} — Cloud fiber maps to fiber over (z,-w)

axioms.name: Kernel Exactness
axioms.statement: There exists a unique seed law K = ell_4: Z_4^2 -> Z_4 from which all four lens projections derive

axioms.name: Lens Constitutivity
axioms.statement: A mature object exists only as the quadruple (Pi_sq, Pi_fl, Pi_cl, Pi_fr) with shared kernel identity

axioms.name: Cloud Admissibility
axioms.statement: A relation state (z,w) is lawful iff z equiv w (mod 2)

axioms.name: Fractal Replay
axioms.statement: Every mature object must admit exact or typed replay from its recursive germ and witness shell

axioms.name: Mobius Equivariance
axioms.statement: There exists an involutive orientation-reversing atlas gluing J such that all lens projections are compatible with J

axioms.name: Four-way Closure
axioms.statement: An object is mature only if its four lens bodies totalize to one coherent event

cross_lens_laws.name: Kernel Preservation
cross_lens_laws.meaning: All four renderers must preserve the same embedded 4D kernel

cross_lens_laws.name: Sector Coherence
cross_lens_laws.meaning: All renderers carry the same shell selector unless explicit shell operator applied

cross_lens_laws.name: Board Coherence
cross_lens_laws.meaning: Square commitment, Flower orbit, Cloud uncertainty, Fractal seed reference the same mirror-board family

cross_lens_laws.name: Replay Closure
cross_lens_laws.meaning: Fractal collapse and expansion close back to the same committed Square object

cross_lens_laws.name: Phase-Board Compatibility
cross_lens_laws.meaning: A Flower move must correspond to a lawful Square transport plus shell update

cross_lens_laws.name: Cloud Admissibility
cross_lens_laws.meaning: Cloud support lives on lawful sectors and lawful board families in committed mode

cross_lens_bridge_operators.description: Six pairwise bridge operators between the four projections

bridges.formula: B_{sq_fr}(x,y) = seed node (x,y) regarded as recursive germ of all lifts
B_{cl_sq}(F_{z,w}) = choose/witness one branch in F_{z,w}

cross_lens_bridge_operators.key_insight: Some cross-lens maps are functions; others are refinements or bundle maps. That is why Cloud must be treated as a fiber object.

sfcr_lattice.name: 15-Station SFCR Boolean Transport Lattice
sfcr_lattice.definition: L_SFCR = P({S,F,C,R}) \ empty — ordered by inclusion

six_shell_lift.name: 6x6 DLS Selector Shell
six_shell_lift.doctrine: 6 is not 'more symbols than 4.' It is a six-state selector fiber over a preserved 4-state kernel grammar.
six_shell_lift.coherent_shell_law: Always exactly 6 coherent sectors regardless of dimension
six_shell_lift.total_addressable: 6 x 256 = 1536 payload bodies per shell position
six_shell_lift.shell_transport: Every lawful 6D move = payload move in Theta_4 + channel rotation in Pi_3 + mirror/spin flip in Z_2

4D.flower: Orbit O and Tunnel T generators on Z_4^2
4D.fractal: Minimal seed sigma_4 with replay law

6D.square: Committed board + defect label over 6-sector shell
6D.fractal: Seed sigma_6(Theta_4; pi,chi; epsilon; t; s) with row/column triple

12D.square: Crown body committed state — 6 dyads visible
12D.cloud: Crown uncertainty field — full organism fiber
12D.fractal: Crown seed — minimal replay of entire organism

development_sequence: Cloud fiber law: admissible relation base, fiber law, ambiguity shells, refinement operators
Fractal replay law: recursive germ, address ladder, state ladder, replay packets, exact regeneration theorem
Cross-lens bridges: six pairwise bridge operators, triple closures, four-way witness, Mobius-equivariant commutative diagrams
Mobius quotient compatibility: freeze canonical involution J and write full cross-lens operator algebra
